git.workflow: Single source of truth: work on main branch only
git.auto_deploy: Enabled from main branch to Vercel
recent_commits: Add BRANCHES.md: Document active vs obsolete branches, cleanup guide
Add WORKFLOW.md: Single source of truth (main branch only)
Update tracker files: MVP complete (6/6 pages, form email, SPA routing all working)
Merge MVP completion: all pages built, form email working
Update STATUS.md: MVP complete and ready for testing

how_to_verify: Read STATUS.md for full project details
Run: git checkout main && git pull origin main
Run: npm run build (should succeed with 0 errors)

single_source_of_truth.auto_deploy: Enabled (push to main → Vercel deploys automatically)

development_workflow: Always work on 'main' branch (never feature branches)
Pull before starting: git pull origin main
Make changes, test locally: npm run dev
Push to production: git push origin main

cross_device.result: All devices stay synced to origin/main

if_vercel_fails: Run: npm run build locally to verify
If build fails locally, fix and push to main
if_form_fails: Check network tab for API calls to staticforms.dev
Form is integrated with Simple Forms API (working as of 2026-07-19)
start_here: 4. Run: npm run build (verify it works)
5. Ask: what would you like to enhance or change?
